meta.description: A user profile's CRUD access permissions for a feature.

sqlSchema:
CREATE TABLE "obj_f7300234_30fc_416f_9cc6_834e37cf458f" (
    item_id UUID NOT NULL,
    "profile" TEXT,
    "view" BOOLEAN,
    "modify" BOOLEAN,
    "create" BOOLEAN,
    "delete" BOOLEAN,
    CONSTRAINT "pk_obj_f7300234_30fc_416f_9cc6_834e37cf458f" PRIMARY KEY (item_id),
    CONSTRAINT "fk_f730023430fc416f_item" FOREIGN KEY (item_id) REFERENCES items(id)
)
